title: _is_correct does not recognize curated_role granularity
description: _is_correct dispatches on granularity name. curated_role targets have a singular 'role' field but will hit the else branch expecting 'roles', causing KeyError at runtime.

title: run_embedding_model hardcodes granularity names, skips curated targets
description: run_embedding_model iterates over a hardcoded list of granularity names. Curated keys (curated_role, curated_cluster, curated_category) won't match, producing zero rankings.

title: Baselines skip curated_cluster granularity
description: Curated baselines loop runs for [curated_role, curated_category] but skips curated_cluster. Creates asymmetry with embedding models.

title: ZeroDivisionError if curated_test_cases empty
description: If no test cases are covered, run_embedding_model and evaluate_all are called with empty list, crashing the entire experiment run including non-curated results.

title: Config curated.granularities declared but unused
description: config.yaml declares granularities list but run_experiment.py never reads it. Creates false expectation that it controls behavior.

title: Inline imports could be top-level
description: from src.curated_targets and from src.baselines imports are inside the if block. Lightweight local modules could be imported at top level.

title: _is_correct does not recognize curated_role granularity
resolution: Added curated_role to the granularity tuple in _is_correct

title: run_embedding_model hardcodes granularity names, skips curated targets
resolution: Changed loop to iterate over target_sets keys instead of hardcoded list

title: Baselines skip curated_cluster granularity
resolution: Added curated_cluster to baselines granularity loop

title: ZeroDivisionError if curated_test_cases empty
resolution: Added empty guard: skip curated evaluation with warning if no test cases covered
